heading: Omitted
label: 6347 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , authorized appropriations to Secretary of Energy of $40,000,000 for each of fiscal years ending and 1982, for industrial energy conservation demonstration projects designed to substantially increase productivity in industry.Pub. L. 96–294, title V, § 59194 Stat. 761June 30, 1980Sept. 30, 1981Section was enacted as part of the Energy Security Act, and not as part of the Energy Policy and Conservation Act which comprises this chapter.
